description.ko: 유동적인 움직임과 자연스러운 대칭을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 생물학적 리듬과 부드러운 심해의 조류에서 영감을 받은 빛나는 형태의 매끄러운 전이를 담아냈습니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of fluid motion and natural symmetry, capturing the seamless transition of luminous forms inspired by biological rhythms and gentle underwater currents.

prompt: Macro cinematic shot of iridescent fluid silk undulating in deep space, bioluminescent pulses flowing through translucent organic membranes, soft golden and violet glowing currents, liquid dynamics, ethereal atmosphere, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution.
